metrics.name: Signups
metrics.description:
[go/glossary](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/marketingdataeng/Full+Funnel+Attribution+Data+Dictionary): The merchant account creation event which is logged when a visitor enters an email and password for the first time on squareup.com.

[Documentation for app_bi.hexagon.vfact_signups](https://wiki.sqprod.co/display/bi/app_bi.hexagon.vfact_signups)
metrics.sql:
select
  merchant_token,
  signup_at as timestamp
from app_marketing.public.vfact_signups

metrics.name: Any Hardware Return (non-warranty)
metrics.description: Merchants who submitted a hardware return, non-warranty related
metrics.sql:
SELECT 
  pentagon_merchant_token AS merchant_token
  , TIMESTAMP_FROM_PARTS(return_created_date,TO_TIME('23:59:59')) AS timestamp
FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_return_item
WHERE is_warranty_order = FALSE
  AND return_created_date IS NOT NULL
  AND return_created_date >= '{{ startDate }}'

metrics.name: Any Shop 1P Hardware Purchase
metrics.description: Merchants who completed a Shop order with a at least 1 1P hardware unit
metrics.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  fsl.pentagon_merchant_token AS merchant_token
  , fsl.created_at AS timestamp
FROM app_hardware.hdm.fact_shop_line_item fsl
WHERE product_reader_type LIKE ANY ('R4%', 'R12','S1', 'S3', 'T2', 'X2', 'T3')
  AND created_date >= '{{ startDate }}' 
  AND is_warranty_order = 0

metrics.name: Completed IDV Successfully (BI Definition)
metrics.sql:
SELECT du.merchant_token
    , du.first_successful_activation_request_approved_at AS timestamp
FROM app_bi.hexagon.vdim_user du
WHERE 1=1
    AND du.is_merchant = 1
    AND du.first_successful_activation_request_approved_at <> '9999-09-09 00:00:00.000'
